I will use </span>    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
```json
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">this tool to fulfill the user's request.</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Using Tool: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">summarize_video_gemini</span>                                                                             <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🔧 Agent Tool Execution \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m`summarize_video_gemini` tool is the only available tool and it is perfectly suited for this task. I need to \u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92ma summary and a list of action items.The user wants a summary and action items from a YouTube video. I have \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthe `summarize_video_gemini` tool which can take a video URL and a prompt to produce a summary. I will use \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthis tool to fulfill the user's request.\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭────────────────────────────────────────────────── Tool Output ──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Of course. Here is a summary of the video's key topics and a list of action items mentioned.</span>                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Video Summary</span>                                                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">This video provides an update on several major developments in the world of artificial intelligence. Key </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">highlights include:</span>                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Elon Musk's \"Macrohard\":** Elon Musk and his company, xAI, have announced a new project called </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">\"Macrohard,\" a tongue-in-cheek name for a serious endeavor to build a purely AI-based software company, </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">conceptualized as an end-to-end neural network operating system that could simulate companies like Microsoft.</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **AI-Generated Worlds &amp; Games:** The concept of AI-generated content is rapidly becoming a reality. The </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">video showcases \"Mirage 2\" from Dynamics Lab, a new, playable online engine that can turn any image into a </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">live, interactive 3D world. This follows similar developments like Google's Genie 3.</span>                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Major Partnerships:**</span>                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Meta &amp; Midjourney:** Meta is partnering with Midjourney to license its advanced \"aesthetic </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">technology,\" likely to improve the image generation capabilities of Meta's future products.</span>                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Meta &amp; Google:** Meta has struck a $10 billion, six-year deal to use Google Cloud's infrastructure </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">to support its massive AI expansion efforts.</span>                                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Robotics Advancements:**</span>                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Figure Robot:** A new demo shows the Figure AI robot successfully folding towels, a complex task </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">that demonstrates its advanced dexterity. This is achieved through an end-to-end neural network, not </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">pre-programming, showing significant progress toward capable personal chore robots.</span>                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Nvidia Jetson Thor:** Nvidia has unveiled Jetson Thor, a new, powerful computer chipset </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">specifically designed for the next generation of general and humanoid robots.</span>                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Industry &amp; Politics:**</span>                                                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **AI Super PAC:** Major players in the AI industry, including Andreessen Horowitz and Perplexity, </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">have formed a bipartisan super PAC called \"Leading the Future\" to promote pro-AI innovation policies.</span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Uber vs. Tesla:** The ...</span>                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Elon Musk's \"Macrohard\":** Elon Musk and his company, xAI, have announced a new project called \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\"Macrohard,\" a tongue-in-cheek name for a serious endeavor to build a purely AI-based software company, \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mconceptualized as an end-to-end neural network operating system that could simulate companies like Microsoft.\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **AI-Generated Worlds & Games:** The concept of AI-generated content is rapidly becoming a reality. The \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mvideo showcases \"Mirage 2\" from Dynamics Lab, a new, playable online engine that can turn any image into a \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mlive, interactive 3D world. This follows similar developments like Google's Genie 3.\u001b[0m                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Major Partnerships:**\u001b[0m                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Meta & Midjourney:** Meta is partnering with Midjourney to license its advanced \"aesthetic \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mtechnology,\" likely to improve the image generation capabilities of Meta's future products.\u001b[0m                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Meta & Google:** Meta has struck a $10 billion, six-year deal to use Google Cloud's infrastructure \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mto support its massive AI expansion efforts.\u001b[0m                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Robotics Advancements:**\u001b[0m                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Figure Robot:** A new demo shows the Figure AI robot successfully folding towels, a complex task \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthat demonstrates its advanced dexterity. This is achieved through an end-to-end neural network, not \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mpre-programming, showing significant progress toward capable personal chore robots.\u001b[0m                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Nvidia Jetson Thor:** Nvidia has unveiled Jetson Thor, a new, powerful computer chipset \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mspecifically designed for the next generation of general and humanoid robots.\u001b[0m                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Industry & Politics:**\u001b[0m                                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **AI Super PAC:** Major players in the AI industry, including Andreessen Horowitz and Perplexity, \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhave formed a bipartisan super PAC called \"Leading the Future\" to promote pro-AI innovation policies.\u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Uber vs. Tesla:** The ...\u001b[0m                                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Video Analyst</span>                                                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Summary of the Video</span>                                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The video discusses several significant advancements and news in the artificial intelligence sector:</span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Elon Musk's \"Macrohard\":** Elon Musk's company, xAI, is embarking on a new project humorously named </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">\"Macrohard.\" The ambitious goal is to create a software company entirely based on AI, envisioned as a neural </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">network operating system capable of simulating large tech companies like Microsoft.</span>                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **AI-Generated Interactive Worlds:** The video highlights the emergence of AI that can generate </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">interactive 3D worlds from images. It features \"Mirage 2\" from Dynamics Lab, an online engine that allows </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">users to experience this technology firsthand, similar to Google's Genie 3.</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Key Industry Partnerships:**</span>                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Meta and Midjourney:** Meta is set to license Midjourney's \"aesthetic technology,\" likely to </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">enhance the image generation capabilities of its products.</span>                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Meta and Google:** A substantial $10 billion, six-year agreement has been signed for Meta to </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">utilize Google Cloud's infrastructure to power its AI expansion.</span>                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Progress in Robotics:**</span>                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Figure AI Robot:** A new demonstration shows the Figure AI robot performing the complex task of </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">folding towels using an end-to-end neural network, indicating a significant step towards practical household </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">robots.</span>                                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Nvidia Jetson Thor:** Nvidia has launched Jetson Thor, a powerful computer chipset designed to be </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">the brain for the next generation of humanoid and general-purpose robots.</span>                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **AI's Influence in Politics and Industry Debates:**</span>                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **\"Leading the Future\" Super PAC:** Key AI industry figures have formed a bipartisan super PAC to </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">advocate for policies that promote AI innovation.</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Uber vs. Tesla on Self-Driving:** The video highlights a strategic disagreement between Uber's CEO,</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">who believes LiDAR is essential for self-driving cars, and Elon Musk, who argues that a camera-only system is</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">safer and that additional sensors can create \"sensor contention.\"</span>                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Challenges in AI Adoption:** An MIT report reveals that 95% of generative AI pilot programs in </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">businesses are failing, indicating that companies are finding it difficult to identify effective use cases </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and integrate the technology successfully.</span>                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### Action Items</span>                                                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Here are some actions you can take based on the information in the video:</span>                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">1.  **Experience AI-Generated Worlds:** Visit **dynamicslab.ai** to try out the Mirage 2 engine and turn </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">images into playable 3D environments.</span>                                                                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">2.  **Explore a Career at xAI:** If you're interested in working on the \"Macrohard\" project, Elon Musk has </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">extended an invitation via his tweet to join xAI.</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">3.  **Watch an AI Play a Game:** Check the video's description for a link to a live stream of GPT-5 playing </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and completing the game Pokémon Crystal.</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">4.  **Enhance Your Marketing with AI:** Download the free \"GPT-5 Marketing Stack: 10 Advanced Prompts\" guide </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">from HubSpot, available through a link in the video description.</span>                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">5.  **Learn About AI-Ready Hardware:** For those interested in high-performance computing for AI, the video's</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">description provides a link to learn more about Dell Pro Max workstations equipped with Nvidia GPUs.</span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">6.  **Understand AI Implementation Challenges:** Read the MIT report on the high failure rate of generative </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">AI pilot programs to learn about the common obstacles businesses face.</span>                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">7.  **Follow AI Policy Developments:** Look into the \"Leading the Future\" super PAC to stay informed about </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">the political initiatives supporting AI innovation.</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mVideo Analyst\u001b[0m                                                                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Summary of the Video\u001b[0m                                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe video discusses several significant advancements and news in the artificial intelligence sector:\u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Elon Musk's \"Macrohard\":** Elon Musk's company, xAI, is embarking on a new project humorously named \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\"Macrohard.\" The ambitious goal is to create a software company entirely based on AI, envisioned as a neural \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mnetwork operating system capable of simulating large tech companies like Microsoft.\u001b[0m                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **AI-Generated Interactive Worlds:** The video highlights the emergence of AI that can generate \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92minteractive 3D worlds from images. It features \"Mirage 2\" from Dynamics Lab, an online engine that allows \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92musers to experience this technology firsthand, similar to Google's Genie 3.\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Key Industry Partnerships:**\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Meta and Midjourney:** Meta is set to license Midjourney's \"aesthetic technology,\" likely to \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menhance the image generation capabilities of its products.\u001b[0m                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Meta and Google:** A substantial $10 billion, six-year agreement has been signed for Meta to \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mutilize Google Cloud's infrastructure to power its AI expansion.\u001b[0m                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Progress in Robotics:**\u001b[0m                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Figure AI Robot:** A new demonstration shows the Figure AI robot performing the complex task of \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfolding towels using an end-to-end neural network, indicating a significant step towards practical household \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrobots.\u001b[0m                                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Nvidia Jetson Thor:** Nvidia has launched Jetson Thor, a powerful computer chipset designed to be \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthe brain for the next generation of humanoid and general-purpose robots.\u001b[0m                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **AI's Influence in Politics and Industry Debates:**\u001b[0m                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **\"Leading the Future\" Super PAC:** Key AI industry figures have formed a bipartisan super PAC to \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92madvocate for policies that promote AI innovation.\u001b[0m                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Uber vs. Tesla on Self-Driving:** The video highlights a strategic disagreement between Uber's CEO,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwho believes LiDAR is essential for self-driving cars, and Elon Musk, who argues that a camera-only system is\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msafer and that additional sensors can create \"sensor contention.\"\u001b[0m                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Challenges in AI Adoption:** An MIT report reveals that 95% of generative AI pilot programs in \u001b[0m          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbusinesses are failing, indicating that companies are finding it difficult to identify effective use cases \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand integrate the technology successfully.\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### Action Items\u001b[0m                                                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHere are some actions you can take based on the information in the video:\u001b[0m                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m1.  **Experience AI-Generated Worlds:** Visit **dynamicslab.ai** to try out the Mirage 2 engine and turn \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mimages into playable 3D environments.\u001b[0m                                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2.  **Explore a Career at xAI:** If you're interested in working on the \"Macrohard\" project, Elon Musk has \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mextended an invitation via his tweet to join xAI.\u001b[0m                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m3.  **Watch an AI Play a Game:** Check the video's description for a link to a live stream of GPT-5 playing \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand completing the game Pokémon Crystal.\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m4.  **Enhance Your Marketing with AI:** Download the free \"GPT-5 Marketing Stack: 10 Advanced Prompts\" guide \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfrom HubSpot, available through a link in the video description.\u001b[0m                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m5.  **Learn About AI-Ready Hardware:** For those interested in high-performance computing for AI, the video's\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdescription provides a link to learn more about Dell Pro Max workstations equipped with Nvidia GPUs.\u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m6.  **Understand AI Implementation Challenges:** Read the MIT report on the high failure rate of generative \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mAI pilot programs to learn about the common obstacles businesses face.\u001b[0m                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m7.  **Follow AI Policy Developments:** Look into the \"Leading the Future\" super PAC to stay informed about \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthe political initiatives supporting AI innovation.\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },

      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── LiteAgent Completion ──────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000; font-weight: bold\">LiteAgent Completed</span>                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Name: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">Video Analyst</span>                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">id: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">3ca70b7f-73f8-40ce-b71d-6c1c0bfb27ff</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">role: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">Video Analyst</span>                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">goal: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">Extract accurate, detailed summaries and insights from videos.</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">backstory: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">Understands longform content and produces structured briefings.</span>                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">tools: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">[CrewStructuredTool(name='summarize_video_gemini', description='Tool Name: summarize_video_gemini</span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">Tool Arguments: {'video_url': {'description': 'YouTube or direct video URL', 'type': 'str'}, 'prompt': </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">{'description': 'Instruction for how to summarize', 'type': 'Union[str, NoneType]'}, 'stream': </span>                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">{'description': 'If True, uses server-side streaming', 'type': 'Union[bool, NoneType]'}, 'model': </span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">{'description': 'Gemini model name', 'type': 'Union[str, NoneType]'}, 'mime_type': {'description': 'Video </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">MIME type', 'type': 'Union[str, NoneType]'}, 'response_mime_type': {'description': 'Response format', 'type':</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">'Union[str, NoneType]'}}</span>                                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">Tool Description: </span>                                                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">    Summarize a video using Gemini (Google AI Studio).</span>                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">    Args:</span>                                                                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        video_url: A YouTube or direct video URL.</span>                                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        prompt:    Instruction for how to summarize.</span>                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        stream:    If True, uses server-side streaming.</span>                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        model:     Gemini model name, e.g. 'gemini-2.5-pro'.</span>                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        mime_type: Usually 'video/*'.</span>                                                                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        response_mime_type: 'text/plain' only (not 'text/markdown').</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">    Returns:</span>                                                                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">        Plain text summary.</span>                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">    ')]</span>                                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">verbose: </span><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">True</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Tool Args: </span>                                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m LiteAgent Completion \u001b[0m\u001b[32m─────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[1;32mLiteAgent Completed\u001b[0m                                                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mName: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mVideo Analyst\u001b[0m                                                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mid: \u001b[0m\u001b[32m3ca70b7f-73f8-40ce-b71d-6c1c0bfb27ff\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mrole: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mVideo Analyst\u001b[0m                                                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mgoal: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mExtract accurate, detailed summaries and insights from videos.\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mbackstory: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mUnderstands longform content and produces structured briefings.\u001b[0m                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mtools: \u001b[0m\u001b[32m[CrewStructuredTool(name='summarize_video_gemini', description='Tool Name: summarize_video_gemini\u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32mTool Arguments: {'video_url': {'description': 'YouTube or direct video URL', 'type': 'str'}, 'prompt': \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m{'description': 'Instruction for how to summarize', 'type': 'Union[str, NoneType]'}, 'stream': \u001b[0m                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m{'description': 'If True, uses server-side streaming', 'type': 'Union[bool, NoneType]'}, 'model': \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m{'description': 'Gemini model name', 'type': 'Union[str, NoneType]'}, 'mime_type': {'description': 'Video \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32mMIME type', 'type': 'Union[str, NoneType]'}, 'response_mime_type': {'description': 'Response format', 'type':\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m'Union[str, NoneType]'}}\u001b[0m                                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32mTool Description: \u001b[0m                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m    Summarize a video using Gemini (Google AI Studio).\u001b[0m                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m    Args:\u001b[0m                                                                                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        video_url: A YouTube or direct video URL.\u001b[0m                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        prompt:    Instruction for how to summarize.\u001b[0m                                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        stream:    If True, uses server-side streaming.\u001b[0m                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        model:     Gemini model name, e.g. 'gemini-2.5-pro'.\u001b[0m                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        mime_type: Usually 'video/*'.\u001b[0m                                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        response_mime_type: 'text/plain' only (not 'text/markdown').\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m    Returns:\u001b[0m                                                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m        Plain text summary.\u001b[0m                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m    ')]\u001b[0m                                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mverbose: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mTrue\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mTool Args: \u001b[0m                                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯\u001b[0m\n"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\">\n",

      "text/plain": [

     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"

   ],
   "source": [
    "from crewai import Agent, LLM\n",
    "\n",
    "llm = LLM(model=\"gemini/gemini-2.5-pro\", api_key=GEMINI_API_KEY)\n",
    "\n",
    "video_analyst = Agent(\n",
    "    role=\"Video Analyst\",\n",
    "    goal=\"Extract accurate, detailed summaries and insights from videos.\",\n",
    "    backstory=\"Understands longform content and produces structured briefings.\",\n",
    "    tools=[SummarizeVideoGeminiTool()],\n",
    "    llm=llm,\n",
    "    verbose=True,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    result = video_analyst.kickoff(messages=\"Summarize this video with action items: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hBEAF-pCkz4\")\n",
    "except Exception as e:\n",
    "    print(f\"Error: {e}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "id": "IntFVnYKuMyH"
   },
   "source": [
    "## Print the video summary"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "metadata": {
    "colab": {
     "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
     "height": 710
    },
    "id": "a0ykkfD-t-ug",
    "outputId": "8ea04ab8-95a3-40a8-a48d-467a6cbbbe2c"
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/markdown": [
       "### Summary of the Video\n",
       "\n",
       "The video discusses several significant advancements and news in the artificial intelligence sector:\n",
       "\n",
       "*   **Elon Musk's \"Macrohard\":** Elon Musk's company, xAI, is embarking on a new project humorously named \"Macrohard.\" The ambitious goal is to create a software company entirely based on AI, envisioned as a neural network operating system capable of simulating large tech companies like Microsoft.\n",
       "*   **AI-Generated Interactive Worlds:** The video highlights the emergence of AI that can generate interactive 3D worlds from images. It features \"Mirage 2\" from Dynamics Lab, an online engine that allows users to experience this technology firsthand, similar to Google's Genie 3.\n",
       "*   **Key Industry Partnerships:**\n",
       "    *   **Meta and Midjourney:** Meta is set to license Midjourney's \"aesthetic technology,\" likely to enhance the image generation capabilities of its products.\n",
       "    *   **Meta and Google:** A substantial $10 billion, six-year agreement has been signed for Meta to utilize Google Cloud's infrastructure to power its AI expansion.\n",
       "*   **Progress in Robotics:**\n",
       "    *   **Figure AI Robot:** A new demonstration shows the Figure AI robot performing the complex task of folding towels using an end-to-end neural network, indicating a significant step towards practical household robots.\n",
       "    *   **Nvidia Jetson Thor:** Nvidia has launched Jetson Thor, a powerful computer chipset designed to be the brain for the next generation of humanoid and general-purpose robots.\n",
       "*   **AI's Influence in Politics and Industry Debates:**\n",
       "    *   **\"Leading the Future\" Super PAC:** Key AI industry figures have formed a bipartisan super PAC to advocate for policies that promote AI innovation.\n",
       "    *   **Uber vs. Tesla on Self-Driving:** The video highlights a strategic disagreement between Uber's CEO, who believes LiDAR is essential for self-driving cars, and Elon Musk, who argues that a camera-only system is safer and that additional sensors can create \"sensor contention.\"\n",
       "*   **Challenges in AI Adoption:** An MIT report reveals that 95% of generative AI pilot programs in businesses are failing, indicating that companies are finding it difficult to identify effective use cases and integrate the technology successfully.\n",
       "\n",
       "### Action Items\n",
       "\n",
       "Here are some actions you can take based on the information in the video:\n",
       "\n",
       "1.  **Experience AI-Generated Worlds:** Visit **dynamicslab.ai** to try out the Mirage 2 engine and turn images into playable 3D environments.\n",
       "2.  **Explore a Career at xAI:** If you're interested in working on the \"Macrohard\" project, Elon Musk has extended an invitation via his tweet to join xAI.\n",
       "3.  **Watch an AI Play a Game:** Check the video's description for a link to a live stream of GPT-5 playing and completing the game Pokémon Crystal.\n",
       "4.  **Enhance Your Marketing with AI:** Download the free \"GPT-5 Marketing Stack: 10 Advanced Prompts\" guide from HubSpot, available through a link in the video description.\n",
       "5.  **Learn About AI-Ready Hardware:** For those interested in high-performance computing for AI, the video's description provides a link to learn more about Dell Pro Max workstations equipped with Nvidia GPUs.\n",
       "6.  **Understand AI Implementation Challenges:** Read the MIT report on the high failure rate of generative AI pilot programs to learn about the common obstacles businesses face.\n",
       "7.  **Follow AI Policy Developments:** Look into the \"Leading the Future\" super PAC to stay informed about the political initiatives supporting AI innovation."
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.Markdown object>"
      ]
```

# Guardrails

### `Guardrails/task_guardrails.ipynb`

```json
{
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "vh58zkJWdXaL"
      },
      "source": [
        "# **Introduction to Task Guardrails in CrewAI**\n",
        "\n",
        "This notebook will demonstrate using CrewAI Task Guardrails — a powerful way to add custom validation logic to your agent workflows.\n",
        "\n",
        "Just like bumpers in bowling, guardrails help your AI agents stay on track by validating the output of a task and deciding whether it needs to retry.\n",
        "\n",
        "We’ll show you how to:\n",
        "*   Write a custom guardrail function\n",
        "*   Attach it to a task\n",
        "*   Automatically retry until the output meets your criteria\n",
        "\n",
        "Let’s get started! 🚀"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "qOIyf22hegRt"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Setup: Imports and API Key\n",
        "Before we define our agent and guardrail logic, we import the required modules from CrewAI and initialize the LLM.\n",
        "\n",
        "We'll also use a search tool (**SerperDevTool**) and the **TaskOutput** object to handle validation logic."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "collapsed": true,
        "id": "gSX3sW2rBqDi"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "name": "stdout",
          "output_type": "stream",
          "text": [
            "Note: you may need to restart the kernel to use updated packages.\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "%uv pip install -U -q crewai crewai-tools"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 2,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "cfyB1y_2eu5m"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "name": "stderr",
          "output_type": "stream",
          "text": [
            "/Users/tonykipkemboi/Workspace/crewAI-quickstarts/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/pydantic/_internal/_config.py:323: PydanticDeprecatedSince20: Support for class-based `config` is deprecated, use ConfigDict instead. Deprecated in Pydantic V2.0 to be removed in V3.0. See Pydantic V2 Migration Guide at https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.11/migration/\n",
            "  warnings.warn(DEPRECATION_MESSAGE, DeprecationWarning)\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "from crewai import Agent, Task, LLM, Crew\n",
        "from typing import Tuple, Union, Dict, Any\n",
        "from crewai import TaskOutput\n",
        "from datetime import date\n",
        "from crewai_tools import SerperDevTool"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 3,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "2XBfhfbJU8-s"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# Filter out deprecation warnings\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=SyntaxWarning, module=\"pysbd\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 5,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "hvF9pE31BwTx"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "name": "stdout",
          "output_type": "stream",
          "text": [
            "✅ API keys set successfully!\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "import os\n",
        "\n",
        "SERPER_API_KEY = os.getenv('SERPER_API_KEY')\n",
        "OPENAI_API_KEY = os.getenv('OPENAI_API_KEY')\n",
        "\n",
        "if SERPER_API_KEY and OPENAI_API_KEY:\n",
        "    os.environ['SERPER_API_KEY'] = SERPER_API_KEY\n",
        "    os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY'] = OPENAI_API_KEY\n",
        "    print('✅ API keys set successfully!')\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    raise ValueError('Please enter both SERPER and OPENAI API keys')"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "iIVHahH3e89n"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Custom Guardrail Function\n",
        "Here’s where the magic happens!\n",
        "\n",
        "We're defining a custom validation function called **validate_blog_content**. This function checks the output of a task — in this case, we’re enforcing that the result is less than **{pick-your-word-count}** words.\n",
        "\n",
        "If it passes the check, the task is complete.\n",
        "If it fails, CrewAI will retry it (up to the number of retries you specify)."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 7,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "QuTqdqYje7Tg"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "def validate_blog_content(result: TaskOutput) -> Tuple[bool, Any]:\n",
        "    \"\"\"Validate blog content meets requirements.\"\"\"\n",
        "    try:\n",
        "        # Check word count\n",
        "        try:\n",
        "            word_count = len(result.raw.split())\n",
        "            print(f\"Word count: {word_count}\")\n",
        "            if word_count > 50:\n",
        "                return (False, \"Blog content exceeds 50 words\")\n",
        "        except Exception as wc_error:\n",
        "            print(f\"Error during word count check: {wc_error}\")\n",
        "            return (False, f\"Error during word count check: {wc_error}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Additional validation logic here\n",
        "        return (True, result.raw.strip())\n",
        "    except Exception as e:\n",
        "        print(f\"Unexpected error during validation: {e}\")\n",
        "        return (False, f\"Unexpected error during validation: {e}\")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "JtA01oODgD4q"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Define your Crew (Agent + Task + Tools)\n",
        "Now we create a simple agent called \"**Blog Writer**\" whose goal is to generate blog content."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 8,
      "metadata": {
        "collapsed": true,
        "id": "_eE-FoH1BkdL"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "# LLM to be used by the agent(s)\n",
        "llm = LLM(model=\"gpt-4o-mini\", api_key=OPENAI_API_KEY)\n",
        "\n",
        "blog_agent = Agent(\n",
        "    role=\"Blog Writer\",\n",
        "    goal=\"Write blog post\",\n",
        "    backstory=\"An expert blog writer\",\n",
        "    tools=[SerperDevTool()],\n",
        "    llm=llm,\n",
        "    verbose=True\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "blog_task = Task(\n",
        "    description=\"Write a super DETAILED blog post about {prompt} for {year}\",\n",
        "    expected_output=\"\"\"A properly structured blog post under 50 words.\n",
        "    Blog format:\n",
        "    # Title\n",
        "    ## Subtitle\n",
        "    Paragraphs...\n",
        "    \"\"\",\n",
        "    agent=blog_agent,\n",
        "    markdown=True,\n",
        "    guardrail=validate_blog_content,  # Add the guardrail function\n",
        "    max_retries=4  # Set the maximum number of retries\n",
        ")\n",
        "\n",
        "crew = Crew(\n",
        "    agents=[blog_agent],\n",
        "    tasks=[blog_task],\n",
        "    verbose=True\n",
        ")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "NTWprkOWfyjs"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Launch the Crew\n",
        "Finally, we bundle the agent and task into a **Crew**, pass in some inputs (*prompt* and *year*), and run it using **.kickoff()**."
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 9,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "WOHsWzcrf5mr"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {

              "<span style=\"color: #008080; text-decoration-color: #008080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #008080; text-decoration-color: #008080; font-weight: bold\">Crew Execution Started</span>                                                                                         <span style=\"color: #008080; text-decoration-color: #008080\">│</span>\n",
              "<span style=\"color: #008080; text-decoration-color: #008080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Name: </span><span style=\"color: #008080; text-decoration-color: #008080\">crew</span>                                                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008080; text-decoration-color: #008080\">│</span>\n",

              "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">## The Future of Automated Workflows</span>                                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

              "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- Integration with leading LLMs</span>                                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
```
