      ],
      "source": [
        "results = crew.kickoff(\n",
        "    inputs={\n",
        "        \"prompt\": \"CrewAI\",\n",
        "        \"year\": date.today().year\n",
        "    }\n",
        ")"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "BshuwhDbfrrl"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Displaying the Result\n",
        "Once the Crew finishes executing, we display the final blog post using Markdown formatting:"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 10,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "-mR7kBBBftlw"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "data": {
            "text/markdown": [
              "# CrewAI in 2025\n",
              "## The Future of Automated Workflows\n",
              "\n",
              "As **AI technologies continue to evolve**, CrewAI is at the forefront, enabling developers to create intricate automated workflows. \n",
              "\n",
              "Key features include:\n",
              "- Integration with leading LLMs\n",
              "- Enhanced multi-agent collaboration\n",
              "- Comprehensive support for Python \n",
              "\n",
              "Stay tuned for more updates!"
            ],
            "text/plain": [
              "<IPython.core.display.Markdown object>"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "output_type": "display_data"
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "from IPython.display import display, Markdown\n",
        "display(Markdown(results.raw))"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "o28BkhFDiakJ"
      },
      "source": [
        "## Conclusion\n",
        "\n",
        "And that’s it! You’ve now seen how to:\n",
        "\n",
        "*   Write and register a task guardrail in CrewAI\n",
        "*   Validate custom output logic\n",
        "*   Automatically rerun tasks that don’t meet your standards\n",
        "\n",
        "This makes your agents **more reliable**, **more controllable**, and **better suited to production use cases**.\n",
        "\n",
        "👉 [Learn more in the docs](https://docs.crewai.com/en/concepts/tasks#task-guardrails)"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "metadata": {
    "colab": {
      "provenance": []
    },

# Planning

### `Planning/crewai_planning.ipynb`

```json
{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {
    "id": "BqpOx9MBbCkw"
   },
   "source": [
    "# How to use CrewAI Planning in your Crew of agents\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "The planning feature in CrewAI allows you to add planning capability to your crew. When enabled, before each Crew iteration, all Crew information is sent to an AgentPlanner that will plan the tasks step by step, and this plan will be added to each task description.\n",
    "\n",
    "This guide will serve as a demostration of how to use the **planning** feature in your crews. Let's start by installing required packages."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Install dependencies"
   ]
  },

    "%pip install -U --quiet crewai crewai-tools exa_py\n",

   "cell_type": "code",

    "id": "zEWX4rlAaMsx"

   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "# Filter out deprecation warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', message='Pydantic serializer warnings')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Configure API keys for both the LLM and Exa for searching the web."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {
    "id": "h5Fz5dSeaOT4"
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "from crewai import LLM\n",
    "from crewai_tools import EXASearchTool\n",
    "\n",
    "OPENAI_API_KEY = os.getenv('OPENAI_API_KEY')\n",
    "EXA_API_KEY = os.getenv('EXA_API_KEY')\n",
    "\n",
    "openai_model = LLM(model=\"openai/gpt-4o-mini\", api_key=OPENAI_API_KEY)\n",
    "tool = EXASearchTool(api_key=EXA_API_KEY)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Now we build our agents!\n",
    " \n",
    "- **Analyst** to do research and a \n",
    "- **Reporter** to generate a detailed report from the research.\n",
    "- In our **crew** we will add **`planning=True`** to enable planning capabilities for our agents before they perform the tasks. \n",
    "- Here's where we also add the **`planning_llm`** that will be used to plan the tasks"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {
    "colab": {
     "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",

       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">by defining the specific focus areas of Influencer Marketing based on current industry needs, such as </span>         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">platforms used, audience engagement strategies, or ROI measurement techniques. </span>                                <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">╭──────────────────────────────────────────── 🔧 Agent Tool Execution ────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Research Specialist</span>                                                                                     <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Thought: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">I need to gather recent information on Influencer Marketing trends to create a detailed report </span>       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">tailored for C-suite executives. I will begin by conducting a search with the specified parameters.</span>            <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Using Tool: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">EXASearchTool</span>                                                                                      <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯</span>\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🔧 Agent Tool Execution \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Research Specialist</span>                                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**Executive Report on Influencer Marketing Trends (2025)**</span>                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**I. Executive Summary**</span>                                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - Overview of the increasing significance of Influencer Marketing in 2025.</span>                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - Highlighting authenticity, AI integration, and ROI measurement.</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**II. Current Trends in Influencer Marketing**</span>                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **A. Shift to Micro and Nano Influencers**</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">      - Authenticity and engagement.</span>                                                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **B. Rise of AI in Campaign Optimization**</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">      - Automation and data-driven strategies.</span>                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **C. Growth of Multi-Channel Strategies**</span>                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">      - Utilizing various platforms effectively.</span>                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**III. Audience Engagement Strategies**</span>                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **A. Video Content Proliferation**</span>                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">      - Understanding audience preferences for content formats.</span>                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **B. Platform-Specific Features**</span>                                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">      - Tailoring approaches for TikTok and Instagram.</span>                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**IV. Measuring ROI in Influencer Marketing**</span>                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **A. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)**</span>                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">      - Focusing on engagement rates and conversion metrics.</span>                                                   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">   - **B. Utilizing Benchmark Reports**</span>                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m──────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🤖 Agent Started \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mTask: \u001b[0m\u001b[92mGenerate a detailed report on Influencer marketing1. Start with the outline created from the research \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfindings to guide the report structure. \u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2. Use a markdown editor to draft the report, focusing on clarity and executive readability. \u001b[0m                  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m3. For sections such as Introduction, Industry Overview, Key Trends, Case Studies, and Recommendations: \u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   - Write clear and concise explanations using data and insights from the research phase. \u001b[0m                    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m   - Utilize bullet points, charts, or graphs where applicable to highlight important statistics or \u001b[0m           \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcomparisons. \u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭───────────────────────────────────────────── ✅ Agent Final Answer ─────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Research Specialist</span>                                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Final Answer:</span>                                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">```markdown</span>                                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\"># Executive Report on Influencer Marketing Trends (2025)</span>                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">## I. Executive Summary</span>                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Influencer marketing continues to evolve rapidly in 2025, marked by:</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- Increased reliance on **micro and nano influencers** for authentic engagement.</span>                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- Integration of **artificial intelligence** for campaign optimization, enabling personalized experiences at </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">scale.</span>                                                                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- Enhanced methods for **measuring return on investment (ROI)**, focusing on data-driven insights.</span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">## II. Current Trends in Influencer Marketing</span>                                                                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">### A. Shift to Micro and Nano Influencers</span>                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">- **Authenticity and Engagement:** Brands are shifting focus towards influencers with smaller, more engaged </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">audiences to foster genuine connections.</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m ✅ Agent Final Answer \u001b[0m\u001b[32m────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mResearch Specialist\u001b[0m                                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Answer:\u001b[0m                                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m```markdown\u001b[0m                                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m# Executive Report on Influencer Marketing Trends (2025)\u001b[0m                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m## I. Executive Summary\u001b[0m                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mInfluencer marketing continues to evolve rapidly in 2025, marked by:\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- Increased reliance on **micro and nano influencers** for authentic engagement.\u001b[0m                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- Integration of **artificial intelligence** for campaign optimization, enabling personalized experiences at \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mscale.\u001b[0m                                                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- Enhanced methods for **measuring return on investment (ROI)**, focusing on data-driven insights.\u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m## II. Current Trends in Influencer Marketing\u001b[0m                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### A. Shift to Micro and Nano Influencers\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Authenticity and Engagement:** Brands are shifting focus towards influencers with smaller, more engaged \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92maudiences to foster genuine connections.\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### B. Rise of AI in Campaign Optimization\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Automation and Data-Driven Strategies:** AI is being leveraged for analyzing consumer behavior, \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moptimizing content delivery, and personalizing audience interactions.\u001b[0m                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### C. Growth of Multi-Channel Strategies\u001b[0m                                                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Utilizing Various Platforms Effectively:** Marketers are embracing multi-channel strategies that include \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mTikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, ensuring wider reach and diverse audience engagement.\u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m## III. Audience Engagement Strategies\u001b[0m                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### A. Video Content Proliferation\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Understanding Audience Preferences:** There is a marked preference for video content across platforms, \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92memphasizing the importance of impactful storytelling.\u001b[0m                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### B. Platform-Specific Features\u001b[0m                                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Tailoring Approaches:** Strategies are being tailored to specific platform features, for instance:\u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  - Utilizing **Instagram Reels** for bite-sized storytelling.\u001b[0m                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m  - Engaging audiences on **TikTok** with humorous and relatable content.\u001b[0m                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### A. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- **Engagement Rates and Conversion Metrics:** Brands are identifying crucial KPIs such as click-through \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mrates, engagement metrics, and conversion rates to measure campaign effectiveness.\u001b[0m                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92menabling brands to compare their efforts and strategize accordingly.\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m## V. Challenges in Influencer Marketing\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m### A. Navigating Changing Algorithms\u001b[0m                                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m## VI. Future Directions\u001b[0m                                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- As influencer marketing continues to evolve, the focus will remain on **authenticity**, \u001b[0m                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m- Strategic recommendations for C-suite executives include investing in data analytics to enhance campaign \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mInfluencer marketing offers an invaluable approach to deepen customer relationships and drive growth. By \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">- Increased reliance on **micro and nano influencers** for authentic engagement.</span>                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">- Integration of **artificial intelligence** for campaign optimization, enabling personalized experiences at </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">scale.</span>                                                                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">- Enhanced methods for **measuring return on investment (ROI)**, focusing on data-driven insights.</span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

Shift to Micro and Nano Influencers</span>                                                                     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, ensuring wider reach and diverse audience engagement.</span>                          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">- **Understanding Audience Preferences:** There is a marked preference for video content across platforms, </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m───────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m Crew Completion \u001b[0m\u001b[32m───────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[1;32mCrew Execution Completed\u001b[0m                                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mName: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mcrew\u001b[0m                                                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mID: \u001b[0m\u001b[32mb2ecb48f-8b8a-4466-8c6b-85f573ae7701\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mTool Args: \u001b[0m                                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mFinal Output: ```markdown\u001b[0m                                                                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m# Executive Report on Influencer Marketing Trends (2025)\u001b[0m                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m## I. Executive Summary\u001b[0m                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mInfluencer marketing continues to evolve rapidly in 2025, marked by:\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- Increased reliance on **micro and nano influencers** for authentic engagement.\u001b[0m                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- Integration of **artificial intelligence** for campaign optimization, enabling personalized experiences at \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mscale.\u001b[0m                                                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- Enhanced methods for **measuring return on investment (ROI)**, focusing on data-driven insights.\u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m## II. Current Trends in Influencer Marketing\u001b[0m                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### A. Shift to Micro and Nano Influencers\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Authenticity and Engagement:** Brands are shifting focus towards influencers with smaller, more engaged \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37maudiences to foster genuine connections.\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### B. Rise of AI in Campaign Optimization\u001b[0m                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Automation and Data-Driven Strategies:** AI is being leveraged for analyzing consumer behavior, \u001b[0m           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37moptimizing content delivery, and personalizing audience interactions.\u001b[0m                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### C. Growth of Multi-Channel Strategies\u001b[0m                                                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Utilizing Various Platforms Effectively:** Marketers are embracing multi-channel strategies that include \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mTikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, ensuring wider reach and diverse audience engagement.\u001b[0m                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m## III. Audience Engagement Strategies\u001b[0m                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### A. Video Content Proliferation\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Understanding Audience Preferences:** There is a marked preference for video content across platforms, \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37memphasizing the importance of impactful storytelling.\u001b[0m                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Tailoring Approaches:** Strategies are being tailored to specific platform features, for instance:\u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m  - Utilizing **Instagram Reels** for bite-sized storytelling.\u001b[0m                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m  - Engaging audiences on **TikTok** with humorous and relatable content.\u001b[0m                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m## IV. Measuring ROI in Influencer Marketing\u001b[0m                                                                   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### A. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Engagement Rates and Conversion Metrics:** Brands are identifying crucial KPIs such as click-through \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mrates, engagement metrics, and conversion rates to measure campaign effectiveness.\u001b[0m                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### B. Utilizing Benchmark Reports\u001b[0m                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Understanding Market Standards:** Benchmark reports provide essential insights on cost and performance, \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37menabling brands to compare their efforts and strategize accordingly.\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m## V. Challenges in Influencer Marketing\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### A. Navigating Changing Algorithms\u001b[0m                                                                          \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Adapting to Platform Changes:** Frequent algorithm updates require brands to remain agile and adjust \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mstrategies to maintain visibility and engagement.\u001b[0m                                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m### B. Managing Authenticity vs. Commercialization\u001b[0m                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- **Maintaining Audience Trust:** Brands must balance promotional activities with maintaining the \u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mauthenticity that audiences expect from influencer partnerships.\u001b[0m                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- As influencer marketing continues to evolve, the focus will remain on **authenticity**, \u001b[0m                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m**diversification**, and **results-driven methodologies**.\u001b[0m                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m- Strategic recommendations for C-suite executives include investing in data analytics to enhance campaign \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37meffectiveness and prioritizing long-term relationships with influencers.\u001b[0m                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m## VII. Conclusion\u001b[0m                                                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mInfluencer marketing offers an invaluable approach to deepen customer relationships and drive growth. By \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37memphasizing authenticity and adapting to the dynamic landscape, brands can leverage influencer partnerships \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mBrands are encouraged to embrace these trends and adapt to ongoing changes to achieve excellence in their \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37minfluencer marketing strategies. The emphasis on authenticity and measurable results will be essential for \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mmaintaining a competitive edge in 2025.\u001b[0m                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m```\u001b[0m                                                                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37minformation is presented in a logical flow with key trends, engagement strategies, challenges, and future \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mdirections outlined succinctly.\u001b[0m                                                                                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\">\n",
       "</pre>\n"
      ],

     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create an agent with reasoning enabled\n",
    "analyst = Agent(\n",
    "    role=\"Research Specialist\",\n",
    "    goal=\"Conduct detailed research on {topic} using the latest information as of {todays_date}.\",\n",
    "    backstory=\"You are an expert at web research.\",\n",
    "    llm=openai_model,\n",
    "    tools=[tool],\n",
    "    verbose=True\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "reporter = Agent(\n",
    "    role=\"Report Specialist\",\n",
    "    goal=\"Generate a detailed report on {topic} using the latest information as of {todays_date}.\",\n",
    "    backstory=\"You are an expert at executive report writing\",\n",
    "    llm=openai_model,\n",
    "    verbose=True\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create tasks\n",
    "analysis_task = Task(\n",
    "    description=\"Research and analyze the recent trends and generate a detailed report on {topic}\",\n",
    "    expected_output=\"A detailed report structured as an executive report for c-suite execs to read.\",\n",
    "    agent=analyst,\n",
    "    verbose=True\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "report_task = Task(\n",
    "    description=\"Generate a detailed report on {topic}\",\n",
    "    expected_output=\"A detailed report structured as an executive report for c-suite execs to read.\",\n",
    "    agent=analyst,\n",
    "    markdowns=True,\n",
    "    verbose=True\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create a crew and run the task\n",
    "crew = Crew(\n",
    "    agents=[analyst, reporter],\n",
    "    tasks=[analysis_task, report_task],\n",
    "    planning=True,\n",
    "    planning_llm=openai_model,\n",
    "    verbose=True\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "result = crew.kickoff(inputs={\"topic\":\"Influencer marketing\", \"todays_date\": \"July 31, 2025\"})"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {
    "colab": {
     "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
     "height": 986
    },
    "id": "vhhRLW0vdCXI",
    "outputId": "371c1c00-2581-44ec-8794-5e4d9500e65f"
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/markdown": [
       "```markdown\n",
       "# Executive Report on Influencer Marketing Trends (2025)\n",
       "\n",
       "## I. Executive Summary\n",
       "Influencer marketing continues to evolve rapidly in 2025, marked by:\n",
       "- Increased reliance on **micro and nano influencers** for authentic engagement.\n",
       "- Integration of **artificial intelligence** for campaign optimization, enabling personalized experiences at scale.\n",
       "- Enhanced methods for **measuring return on investment (ROI)**, focusing on data-driven insights.\n",
       "\n",
       "## II. Current Trends in Influencer Marketing\n",
       "### A. Shift to Micro and Nano Influencers\n",
       "- **Authenticity and Engagement:** Brands are shifting focus towards influencers with smaller, more engaged audiences to foster genuine connections.\n",
       "\n",
       "### B. Rise of AI in Campaign Optimization\n",
       "- **Automation and Data-Driven Strategies:** AI is being leveraged for analyzing consumer behavior, optimizing content delivery, and personalizing audience interactions.\n",
       "\n",
       "### C. Growth of Multi-Channel Strategies\n",
       "- **Utilizing Various Platforms Effectively:** Marketers are embracing multi-channel strategies that include TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, ensuring wider reach and diverse audience engagement.\n",
       "\n",
       "## III. Audience Engagement Strategies\n",
       "### A. Video Content Proliferation\n",
       "- **Understanding Audience Preferences:** There is a marked preference for video content across platforms, emphasizing the importance of impactful storytelling.\n",
       "\n",
       "### B. Platform-Specific Features\n",
       "- **Tailoring Approaches:** Strategies are being tailored to specific platform features, for instance:\n",
       "  - Utilizing **Instagram Reels** for bite-sized storytelling.\n",
       "  - Engaging audiences on **TikTok** with humorous and relatable content.\n",
       "\n",
       "## IV. Measuring ROI in Influencer Marketing\n",
       "### A. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)\n",
       "- **Engagement Rates and Conversion Metrics:** Brands are identifying crucial KPIs such as click-through rates, engagement metrics, and conversion rates to measure campaign effectiveness.\n",
       "\n",
       "### B. Utilizing Benchmark Reports\n",
       "- **Understanding Market Standards:** Benchmark reports provide essential insights on cost and performance, enabling brands to compare their efforts and strategize accordingly.\n",
       "\n",
       "## V. Challenges in Influencer Marketing\n",
       "### A. Navigating Changing Algorithms\n",
       "- **Adapting to Platform Changes:** Frequent algorithm updates require brands to remain agile and adjust strategies to maintain visibility and engagement.\n",
       "\n",
       "### B. Managing Authenticity vs. Commercialization\n",
       "- **Maintaining Audience Trust:** Brands must balance promotional activities with maintaining the authenticity that audiences expect from influencer partnerships.\n",
       "\n",
       "## VI. Future Directions\n",
       "- As influencer marketing continues to evolve, the focus will remain on **authenticity**, **diversification**, and **results-driven methodologies**.\n",
       "- Strategic recommendations for C-suite executives include investing in data analytics to enhance campaign effectiveness and prioritizing long-term relationships with influencers.\n",
       "\n",
       "## VII. Conclusion\n",
       "Influencer marketing offers an invaluable approach to deepen customer relationships and drive growth. By emphasizing authenticity and adapting to the dynamic landscape, brands can leverage influencer partnerships effectively.\n",
       "\n",
       "---\n",
       "\n",
       "### Final Thoughts\n",
       "Brands are encouraged to embrace these trends and adapt to ongoing changes to achieve excellence in their influencer marketing strategies. The emphasis on authenticity and measurable results will be essential for maintaining a competitive edge in 2025.\n",
       "\n",
       "```\n",
       "This markdown document is structured to promote clarity and readability for executive audiences. The information is presented in a logical flow with key trends, engagement strategies, challenges, and future directions outlined succinctly."
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.Markdown object>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 16,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from IPython.display import Markdown\n",
    "\n",
    "Markdown(result.raw)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Conclusion\n",
    "\n",
    "In the agent task outputs above, you can see where the agent called the planning before starting the task. For more information on Planning, please reference our [documentation](https://docs.crewai.com/en/concepts/planning).\n",
    "\n",
    "The Planing feature is an alternative to the **Reasoning** feature in CrewAI. There's a good chance both perform similar or the reasoning will be better.\n",
    "We recommend trying both to see what works best for you.\n",
    "\n",
    "Happy building! 🎉"
   ]
  }
 ],

# Reasoning

    "# How to use CrewAI Reasoning in Agents\n",
    "\n",
    "- CrewAI supports agent reasoning to allows agents to reflect on a task and create a plan before execution. \n",
    "- This helps the agent approach tasks more methodically and ensures they're ready to perform the assigned work. \n",
    "\n",
    "We'll use a simple crew example to demostrate but first let's setup the code we need to run this notebook."

   "source": [
    "%pip install -U --quiet crewai crewai-tools exa_py\n",
    "%pip install --quiet --upgrade ipywidgets"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {
    "id": "6SFohl7qY9mR"
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "# Filter out deprecation warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', message='Pydantic serializer warnings')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Get the API keys from the environment variable and initialize LLM and ExaSearch Tool"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {
    "id": "iu3cIZK5YXAK"
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "from crewai import LLM\n",
    "from crewai_tools import EXASearchTool\n",
    "\n",
    "OPENAI_API_KEY = os.getenv('OPENAI_API_KEY')\n",
    "EXA_API_KEY = os.getenv('EXA_API_KEY')\n",
    "\n",
    "gemini_model = LLM(model=\"gemini/gemini-2.5-flash-lite\", api_key=GEMINI_API_KEY)\n",
    "tool = EXASearchTool(api_key=EXA_API_KEY)"
   ]
  },
  {

     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">╭─────────────────────────────────────────────── 🧠 Reasoning Plan ───────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Here's a plan to research and analyze recent trends in influencer marketing and generate a detailed report </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">for C-suite executives:</span>                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">**1. Understanding of the Task from a Professional Perspective:**</span>                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">As a Research Specialist, I understand this task requires more than just gathering information; it involves </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">synthesizing complex data into a concise, actionable executive report. The C-suite needs a high-level </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">overview of the current influencer marketing landscape, focusing on strategic insights, ROI, emerging trends,</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">and potential challenges. My expertise lies in identifying reliable sources, discerning signal from noise, </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">and translating raw data into strategic recommendations. The \"latest information as of July 31, 2025\" means I</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">need to prioritize recency and relevance, looking for data and analysis from late 2024 and 2025.</span>               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">**2. Key Steps to Complete the Task:**</span>                                                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Define \"Recent Trends\":** I will establish a timeframe for \"recent\" (e.g., last 12-18 months leading up</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">to July 31, 2025) to ensure the report is current.</span>                                                             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Identify Key Influencer Marketing Pillars:** I will focus on core areas such as:</span>                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Platform trends (e.g., TikTok, Instagram Reels, emerging platforms)</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Influencer types (e.g., nano, micro, macro, celebrity; AI influencers)</span>                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Content formats (e.g., short-form video, live streaming, authentic storytelling)</span>                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Measurement and ROI (key metrics, attribution models, tools)</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Budget allocation and strategies</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Regulatory and ethical considerations (disclosure, authenticity)</span>                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   AI's impact on influencer marketing (content creation, identification, analytics)</span>                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   Consumer behavior shifts and their impact on influencer effectiveness.</span>                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Information Gathering:** I will use the EXASearchTool to find reputable industry reports, surveys, case</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">studies, and articles from leading marketing publications, research firms, and analytics providers. I will </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">prioritize sources published in late 2024 and 2025.</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Data Analysis &amp; Synthesis:** I will analyze the gathered information to identify overarching themes, </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">significant shifts, and actionable insights. This will involve cross-referencing data from multiple sources </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">to validate findings and identify consensus or conflicting viewpoints.</span>                                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Report Structuring:** I will structure the report logically for a C-suite audience:</span>                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Executive Summary:** A concise overview of key findings and recommendations.</span>                         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Current Landscape:** A snapshot of the influencer marketing ecosystem as of mid-2025.</span>                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Key Trends &amp; Innovations:** Detailed analysis of the most impactful recent developments.</span>             <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **ROI &amp; Measurement:** How brands are measuring success and the effectiveness of different </span>            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">strategies.</span>                                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Challenges &amp; Opportunities:** Potential pitfalls and areas for strategic advantage.</span>                  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Recommendations:** Actionable advice for C-suite decision-making.</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Content Generation:** I will draft the report, ensuring a professional tone, clear language, and </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">data-backed statements. I will focus on strategic implications rather than granular operational details.</span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">**3. Approach to Potential Challenges:**</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Information Overload/Recency:** The sheer volume of information and the need for up-to-the-minute data </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">can be overwhelming. I will mitigate this by using precise search queries, focusing on high-authority </span>         <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">sources, and setting strict date filters for my searches.</span>                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">*   **Data Accuracy and Bias:** Different reports may present conflicting data or have inherent biases. I </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

My strategy will involve:</span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Targeted Queries:** I will use specific keywords related to \"influencer marketing trends 2024,\" </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">\"influencer marketing ROI 2025,\" \"AI in influencer marketing,\" \"new social media platforms influencer,\" </span>       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">\"influencer marketing regulations,\" etc.</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Date Filtering:** I will actively use any date filtering capabilities to ensure I retrieve the most</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">current information, focusing on results from late 2024 and 2025.</span>                                              <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Source Evaluation:** I will look for results from reputable marketing intelligence firms (e.g., </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Gartner, Forrester, eMarketer), major advertising and marketing publications (e.g., Ad Age, Marketing Week, </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">The Drum), and established analytics platforms.</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">    *   **Iterative Searching:** If initial searches are too broad or too narrow, I will refine my queries </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">clear understanding of the current influencer marketing landscape as of July 31, 2025. This aligns</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
