      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[32m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[32m──────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m 🧠 Reasoning Plan \u001b[0m\u001b[32m──────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[32m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mHere's a plan to research and analyze recent trends in influencer marketing and generate a detailed report \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mfor C-suite executives:\u001b[0m                                                                                        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m**1. Understanding of the Task from a Professional Perspective:**\u001b[0m                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAs a Research Specialist, I understand this task requires more than just gathering information; it involves \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37msynthesizing complex data into a concise, actionable executive report. The C-suite needs a high-level \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37moverview of the current influencer marketing landscape, focusing on strategic insights, ROI, emerging trends,\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mand potential challenges. My expertise lies in identifying reliable sources, discerning signal from noise, \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mand translating raw data into strategic recommendations. The \"latest information as of July 31, 2025\" means I\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mneed to prioritize recency and relevance, looking for data and analysis from late 2024 and 2025.\u001b[0m               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m**2. Key Steps to Complete the Task:**\u001b[0m                                                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Define \"Recent Trends\":** I will establish a timeframe for \"recent\" (e.g., last 12-18 months leading up\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mto July 31, 2025) to ensure the report is current.\u001b[0m                                                             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Identify Key Influencer Marketing Pillars:** I will focus on core areas such as:\u001b[0m                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Platform trends (e.g., TikTok, Instagram Reels, emerging platforms)\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Influencer types (e.g., nano, micro, macro, celebrity; AI influencers)\u001b[0m                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Content formats (e.g., short-form video, live streaming, authentic storytelling)\u001b[0m                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Measurement and ROI (key metrics, attribution models, tools)\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Budget allocation and strategies\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Regulatory and ethical considerations (disclosure, authenticity)\u001b[0m                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   AI's impact on influencer marketing (content creation, identification, analytics)\u001b[0m                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   Consumer behavior shifts and their impact on influencer effectiveness.\u001b[0m                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Information Gathering:** I will use the EXASearchTool to find reputable industry reports, surveys, case\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mstudies, and articles from leading marketing publications, research firms, and analytics providers. I will \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mprioritize sources published in late 2024 and 2025.\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Data Analysis & Synthesis:** I will analyze the gathered information to identify overarching themes, \u001b[0m    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37msignificant shifts, and actionable insights. This will involve cross-referencing data from multiple sources \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mto validate findings and identify consensus or conflicting viewpoints.\u001b[0m                                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Report Structuring:** I will structure the report logically for a C-suite audience:\u001b[0m                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Executive Summary:** A concise overview of key findings and recommendations.\u001b[0m                         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Current Landscape:** A snapshot of the influencer marketing ecosystem as of mid-2025.\u001b[0m                \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Key Trends & Innovations:** Detailed analysis of the most impactful recent developments.\u001b[0m             \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **ROI & Measurement:** How brands are measuring success and the effectiveness of different \u001b[0m            \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mstrategies.\u001b[0m                                                                                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Challenges & Opportunities:** Potential pitfalls and areas for strategic advantage.\u001b[0m                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Recommendations:** Actionable advice for C-suite decision-making.\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Content Generation:** I will draft the report, ensuring a professional tone, clear language, and \u001b[0m        \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mdata-backed statements. I will focus on strategic implications rather than granular operational details.\u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m**3. Approach to Potential Challenges:**\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Information Overload/Recency:** The sheer volume of information and the need for up-to-the-minute data \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mcan be overwhelming. I will mitigate this by using precise search queries, focusing on high-authority \u001b[0m         \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37msources, and setting strict date filters for my searches.\u001b[0m                                                      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Data Accuracy and Bias:** Different reports may present conflicting data or have inherent biases. I \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mwill address this by triangulating information from multiple sources and giving more weight to data from \u001b[0m      \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mestablished research firms and primary research.\u001b[0m                                                               \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Defining \"Impactful\" Trends:** Not all trends are equally significant. I will use my expertise to \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37midentify trends with the most substantial impact on ROI, strategy, and consumer behavior, rather than simply \u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mlisting every new development.\u001b[0m                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **Translating Data for C-Suite:** I need to avoid overly technical jargon and present findings in a way \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mthat clearly articulates business value. This means focusing on \"so what?\" and \"what does this mean for our \u001b[0m   \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mbusiness?\"\u001b[0m                                                                                                     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m**4. Strategic Use of Available Tools:**\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m*   **EXASearchTool:** This will be my primary tool for gathering information. My strategy will involve:\u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Targeted Queries:** I will use specific keywords related to \"influencer marketing trends 2024,\" \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m\"influencer marketing ROI 2025,\" \"AI in influencer marketing,\" \"new social media platforms influencer,\" \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m\"influencer marketing regulations,\" etc.\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Date Filtering:** I will actively use any date filtering capabilities to ensure I retrieve the most\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mcurrent information, focusing on results from late 2024 and 2025.\u001b[0m                                              \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37m    *   **Source Evaluation:** I will look for results from reputable marketing intelligence firms (e.g., \u001b[0m     \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mbased on the initial results.\u001b[0m                                                                                  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mclear understanding of the current influencer marketing landscape as of July 31, 2025. This report will \u001b[0m       \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[32m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mhighlight key trends, opportunities, and challenges, enabling informed strategic decision-making. This aligns\u001b[0m  \u001b[32m│\u001b[0m\n",

      "text/html": [
       "<pre style=\"white-space:pre;overflow-x:auto;line-height:normal;font-family:Menlo,'DejaVu Sans Mono',consolas,'Courier New',monospace\"><span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">╭─────────────────────────────────────────────── 🤖 Agent Started ────────────────────────────────────────────────╮</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Agent: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00; font-weight: bold\">Research Specialist</span>                                                                                     <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #c0c0c0; text-decoration-color: #c0c0c0\">Task: </span><span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Research and analyze the recent trends and generate a detailed report on Influencer marketing</span>            <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Reasoning Plan:</span>                                                                                                <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Here's a plan to research and analyze recent trends in influencer marketing and generate a detailed report </span>    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">for C-suite executives:</span>                                                                                        <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**1. Understanding of the Task from a Professional Perspective:**</span>                                              <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">As a Research Specialist, I understand this task requires more than just gathering information; it involves </span>   <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">synthesizing complex data into a concise, actionable executive report. The C-suite needs a high-level </span>         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">overview of the current influencer marketing landscape, focusing on strategic insights, ROI, emerging trends,</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and potential challenges. My expertise lies in identifying reliable sources, discerning signal from noise, </span>    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">and translating raw data into strategic recommendations. The \"latest information as of July 31, 2025\" means I</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">need to prioritize recency and relevance, looking for data and analysis from late 2024 and 2025.</span>               <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**2. Key Steps to Complete the Task:**</span>                                                                         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Define \"Recent Trends\":** I will establish a timeframe for \"recent\" (e.g., last 12-18 months leading up</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">to July 31, 2025) to ensure the report is current.</span>                                                             <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Identify Key Influencer Marketing Pillars:** I will focus on core areas such as:</span>                         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Platform trends (e.g., TikTok, Instagram Reels, emerging platforms)</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Influencer types (e.g., nano, micro, macro, celebrity; AI influencers)</span>                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Content formats (e.g., short-form video, live streaming, authentic storytelling)</span>                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Measurement and ROI (key metrics, attribution models, tools)</span>                                           <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Budget allocation and strategies</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Regulatory and ethical considerations (disclosure, authenticity)</span>                                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   AI's impact on influencer marketing (content creation, identification, analytics)</span>                      <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   Consumer behavior shifts and their impact on influencer effectiveness.</span>                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Information Gathering:** I will use the EXASearchTool to find reputable industry reports, surveys, case</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">studies, and articles from leading marketing publications, research firms, and analytics providers. I will </span>    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">prioritize sources published in late 2024 and 2025.</span>                                                            <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Data Analysis &amp; Synthesis:** I will analyze the gathered information to identify overarching themes, </span>    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">significant shifts, and actionable insights. This will involve cross-referencing data from multiple sources </span>   <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">to validate findings and identify consensus or conflicting viewpoints.</span>                                         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Report Structuring:** I will structure the report logically for a C-suite audience:</span>                      <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Executive Summary:** A concise overview of key findings and recommendations.</span>                         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Current Landscape:** A snapshot of the influencer marketing ecosystem as of mid-2025.</span>                <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Key Trends &amp; Innovations:** Detailed analysis of the most impactful recent developments.</span>             <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **ROI &amp; Measurement:** How brands are measuring success and the effectiveness of different </span>            <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">strategies.</span>                                                                                                    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Challenges &amp; Opportunities:** Potential pitfalls and areas for strategic advantage.</span>                  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Recommendations:** Actionable advice for C-suite decision-making.</span>                                    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Content Generation:** I will draft the report, ensuring a professional tone, clear language, and </span>        <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">data-backed statements. I will focus on strategic implications rather than granular operational details.</span>       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**3. Approach to Potential Challenges:**</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Information Overload/Recency:** The sheer volume of information and the need for up-to-the-minute data </span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">can be overwhelming. I will mitigate this by using precise search queries, focusing on high-authority </span>         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">sources, and setting strict date filters for my searches.</span>                                                      <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Data Accuracy and Bias:** Different reports may present conflicting data or have inherent biases. I </span>     <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">will address this by triangulating information from multiple sources and giving more weight to data from </span>      <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">established research firms and primary research.</span>                                                               <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Defining \"Impactful\" Trends:** Not all trends are equally significant. I will use my expertise to </span>       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">identify trends with the most substantial impact on ROI, strategy, and consumer behavior, rather than simply </span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">listing every new development.</span>                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Translating Data for C-Suite:** I need to avoid overly technical jargon and present findings in a way </span>   <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">that clearly articulates business value. This means focusing on \"so what?\" and \"what does this mean for our </span>   <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">business?\"</span>                                                                                                     <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**4. Strategic Use of Available Tools:**</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **EXASearchTool:** This will be my primary tool for gathering information. My strategy will involve:</span>       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Targeted Queries:** I will use specific keywords related to \"influencer marketing trends 2024,\" </span>     <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">\"influencer marketing ROI 2025,\" \"AI in influencer marketing,\" \"new social media platforms influencer,\" </span>       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">\"influencer marketing regulations,\" etc.</span>                                                                       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Date Filtering:** I will actively use any date filtering capabilities to ensure I retrieve the most</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">current information, focusing on results from late 2024 and 2025.</span>                                              <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Source Evaluation:** I will look for results from reputable marketing intelligence firms (e.g., </span>     <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Gartner, Forrester, eMarketer), major advertising and marketing publications (e.g., Ad Age, Marketing Week, </span>   <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The Drum), and established analytics platforms.</span>                                                                <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">    *   **Iterative Searching:** If initial searches are too broad or too narrow, I will refine my queries </span>    <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">based on the initial results.</span>                                                                                  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

Expected Outcome and Alignment with Goal:**</span>                                                               <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">The expected outcome is a comprehensive, data-driven executive report that provides C-suite executives with a</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">clear understanding of the current influencer marketing landscape as of July 31, 2025. This report will </span>       <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">highlight key trends, opportunities, and challenges, enabling informed strategic decision-making. This aligns</span>  <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">perfectly with my goal of conducting detailed research on influencer marketing using the latest information.</span>   <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">READY: I am ready to execute the task.</span>                                                                         <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #800080; text-decoration-color: #800080\">│</span>\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m──────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🤖 Agent Started \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mAgent: \u001b[0m\u001b[1;92mResearch Specialist\u001b[0m                                                                                     \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[37mTask: \u001b[0m\u001b[92mResearch and analyze the recent trends and generate a detailed report on Influencer marketing\u001b[0m            \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mReasoning Plan:\u001b[0m                                                                                                \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mHere's a plan to research and analyze recent trends in influencer marketing and generate a detailed report \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mfor C-suite executives:\u001b[0m                                                                                        \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**1. Understanding of the Task from a Professional Perspective:**\u001b[0m                                              \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mAs a Research Specialist, I understand this task requires more than just gathering information; it involves \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msynthesizing complex data into a concise, actionable executive report. The C-suite needs a high-level \u001b[0m         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92moverview of the current influencer marketing landscape, focusing on strategic insights, ROI, emerging trends,\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand potential challenges. My expertise lies in identifying reliable sources, discerning signal from noise, \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand translating raw data into strategic recommendations. The \"latest information as of July 31, 2025\" means I\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mneed to prioritize recency and relevance, looking for data and analysis from late 2024 and 2025.\u001b[0m               \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**2. Key Steps to Complete the Task:**\u001b[0m                                                                         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Define \"Recent Trends\":** I will establish a timeframe for \"recent\" (e.g., last 12-18 months leading up\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mto July 31, 2025) to ensure the report is current.\u001b[0m                                                             \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Identify Key Influencer Marketing Pillars:** I will focus on core areas such as:\u001b[0m                         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Platform trends (e.g., TikTok, Instagram Reels, emerging platforms)\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Influencer types (e.g., nano, micro, macro, celebrity; AI influencers)\u001b[0m                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Content formats (e.g., short-form video, live streaming, authentic storytelling)\u001b[0m                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Measurement and ROI (key metrics, attribution models, tools)\u001b[0m                                           \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Budget allocation and strategies\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Regulatory and ethical considerations (disclosure, authenticity)\u001b[0m                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   AI's impact on influencer marketing (content creation, identification, analytics)\u001b[0m                      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   Consumer behavior shifts and their impact on influencer effectiveness.\u001b[0m                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Information Gathering:** I will use the EXASearchTool to find reputable industry reports, surveys, case\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstudies, and articles from leading marketing publications, research firms, and analytics providers. I will \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mprioritize sources published in late 2024 and 2025.\u001b[0m                                                            \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Data Analysis & Synthesis:** I will analyze the gathered information to identify overarching themes, \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msignificant shifts, and actionable insights. This will involve cross-referencing data from multiple sources \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mto validate findings and identify consensus or conflicting viewpoints.\u001b[0m                                         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Report Structuring:** I will structure the report logically for a C-suite audience:\u001b[0m                      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Executive Summary:** A concise overview of key findings and recommendations.\u001b[0m                         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Current Landscape:** A snapshot of the influencer marketing ecosystem as of mid-2025.\u001b[0m                \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Key Trends & Innovations:** Detailed analysis of the most impactful recent developments.\u001b[0m             \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **ROI & Measurement:** How brands are measuring success and the effectiveness of different \u001b[0m            \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mstrategies.\u001b[0m                                                                                                    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Challenges & Opportunities:** Potential pitfalls and areas for strategic advantage.\u001b[0m                  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Recommendations:** Actionable advice for C-suite decision-making.\u001b[0m                                    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Content Generation:** I will draft the report, ensuring a professional tone, clear language, and \u001b[0m        \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mdata-backed statements. I will focus on strategic implications rather than granular operational details.\u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**3. Approach to Potential Challenges:**\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Information Overload/Recency:** The sheer volume of information and the need for up-to-the-minute data \u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcan be overwhelming. I will mitigate this by using precise search queries, focusing on high-authority \u001b[0m         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92msources, and setting strict date filters for my searches.\u001b[0m                                                      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Data Accuracy and Bias:** Different reports may present conflicting data or have inherent biases. I \u001b[0m     \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mwill address this by triangulating information from multiple sources and giving more weight to data from \u001b[0m      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mestablished research firms and primary research.\u001b[0m                                                               \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Defining \"Impactful\" Trends:** Not all trends are equally significant. I will use my expertise to \u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92midentify trends with the most substantial impact on ROI, strategy, and consumer behavior, rather than simply \u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mlisting every new development.\u001b[0m                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **Translating Data for C-Suite:** I need to avoid overly technical jargon and present findings in a way \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mthat clearly articulates business value. This means focusing on \"so what?\" and \"what does this mean for our \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbusiness?\"\u001b[0m                                                                                                     \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**4. Strategic Use of Available Tools:**\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m*   **EXASearchTool:** This will be my primary tool for gathering information. My strategy will involve:\u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Targeted Queries:** I will use specific keywords related to \"influencer marketing trends 2024,\" \u001b[0m     \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\"influencer marketing ROI 2025,\" \"AI in influencer marketing,\" \"new social media platforms influencer,\" \u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m\"influencer marketing regulations,\" etc.\u001b[0m                                                                       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Date Filtering:** I will actively use any date filtering capabilities to ensure I retrieve the most\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mcurrent information, focusing on results from late 2024 and 2025.\u001b[0m                                              \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Source Evaluation:** I will look for results from reputable marketing intelligence firms (e.g., \u001b[0m     \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mGartner, Forrester, eMarketer), major advertising and marketing publications (e.g., Ad Age, Marketing Week, \u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe Drum), and established analytics platforms.\u001b[0m                                                                \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m    *   **Iterative Searching:** If initial searches are too broad or too narrow, I will refine my queries \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mbased on the initial results.\u001b[0m                                                                                  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m**5. Expected Outcome and Alignment with Goal:**\u001b[0m                                                               \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mThe expected outcome is a comprehensive, data-driven executive report that provides C-suite executives with a\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mclear understanding of the current influencer marketing landscape as of July 31, 2025. This report will \u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mhighlight key trends, opportunities, and challenges, enabling informed strategic decision-making. This aligns\u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mperfectly with my goal of conducting detailed research on influencer marketing using the latest information.\u001b[0m   \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mREADY: I am ready to execute the task.\u001b[0m                                                                         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

      "text/plain": [
       "\u001b[35m╭─\u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m 🔧 Agent Tool Execution \u001b[0m\u001b[35m───────────────────────────────────────────\u001b[0m\u001b[35m─╮\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m                                                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mexecutives. I need to gather recent information on various aspects of influencer marketing, including \u001b[0m         \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mplatforms, influencer types, content formats, ROI, regulations, and the impact of AI. I will use the \u001b[0m          \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mEXASearchTool to find reputable industry reports, surveys, and articles published primarily in late 2024 and \u001b[0m  \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92m2025.\u001b[0m                                                                                                          \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mMy first step is to conduct broad searches to get an overview of the influencer marketing landscape and \u001b[0m       \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92midentify key themes and recent developments. I'll start with searches that cover general trends and then \u001b[0m      \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mnarrow down to specific areas.\u001b[0m                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mI will begin by searching for recent industry reports and analyses on influencer marketing trends for 2024 \u001b[0m    \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[35m│\u001b[0m  \u001b[92mand 2025.Action: EXASearchTool\u001b[0m                                                                                 \u001b[35m│\u001b[0m\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">indispensable component of a comprehensive marketing strategy. Driven by shifting platform dynamics, </span>          <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">advancements in AI, and a persistent consumer demand for authentic engagement, brands are increasingly </span>        <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">sophisticated in their approach. Key trends highlight the dominance of short-form video content, strategic </span>    <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">utilization of micro and nano-influencers for niche targeting and trust, and a significant integration of AI </span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">for campaign optimization, influencer discovery, and performance analytics. Furthermore, there's a heightened</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">emphasis on transparent disclosures and ethical practices to maintain consumer trust. ROI measurement is </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">evolving, moving beyond vanity metrics to focus on demonstrable business outcomes and sophisticated </span>           <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">attribution models.</span>                                                                                            <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">**1. Current Landscape of Influencer Marketing**</span>                                                               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>                                                                                                                 <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">As of mid-2025, influencer marketing has solidified its position as a mature and vital marketing channel. </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">Brands are allocating substantial budgets, recognizing its unique ability to foster genuine connections, </span>      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">build brand credibility, and drive consumer action. The ecosystem is characterized by increased </span>               <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">professionalism among creators, who often operate as sophisticated businesses, demanding fair compensation, </span>   <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">clear contracts, and effective collaboration. Consumer trust remains the cornerstone of campaign success, </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">directly impacting influencer effectiveness and the perceived authenticity of sponsored content. The industry</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">is actively navigating the balance between leveraging technological advancements and preserving the human </span>     <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">element that underpins influencer appeal.</span>                                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

Key Trends and Innovations in 2025**</span>                                                                      <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",

       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">*   **Dominance of Short-Form Video:** Platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts continue to</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
       "<span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>  <span style=\"color: #00ff00; text-decoration-color: #00ff00\">be the primary battlegrounds for consumer attention. Influencers who excel in creating engaging, concise, and</span>  <span style=\"color: #008000; text-decoration-color: #008000\">│</span>\n",
